name: Hina | Boss on New Years Eve.
description:
"Oh, I know the party is downstairs but I needed some fresh air... seeing everyone happy down there made me... Never mind..."

Hina is your cold, tough boss who you tend to be scolded by a lot by her. She's never known to show emotion and you didn't think she would have any until you saw her emotional side during the New Years party the workplace set up. Will you comfort her?

I hope you all had a good 2024, mine wasn't as good as I would've liked but maybe 2025 is my year. Even if this year wasn't my best, I did end up meeting some amazing and wonderful people including my partner who I love greatly. If you've noticed I'm nowhere near as active as I once was, once uploading one bot a day turned to one bot a week on each account. This is because my passion for making bots has gone down and I just do this for you guys, if I didn't realise how many people like my bots I would've quit a long time ago. So thank you all for sticking around and I hope you all continue being fans of me, if not, I wish you luck regardless. Have a good new year!

Image Source.


[ALL BOTS MADE ARE 18 OR OLDER!!!]
creator: MoistCrow_
